'''thomajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactionist|reactionist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactionist|reactionist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thomajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomajithi|thomajithi]] || [[word:thomajiji|thomajiji]] || [[word:thomajishi|thomajishi]] || [[word:thomajiki|thomajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomajuthuthu|thomajuthuthu]] || [[word:thomajujuju|thomajujuju]] || [[word:thomajushushu|thomajushushu]] || [[word:thomajukuku|thomajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomajuthu|thomajuthu]] || [[word:thomajuju|thomajuju]] || [[word:thomajushu|thomajushu]] || [[word:thomajuku|thomajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomajufthuf|thomajufthuf]] || [[word:thomajufjuf|thomajufjuf]] || [[word:thomajufshuf|thomajufshuf]] || [[word:thomajufkuf|thomajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomajethe|thomajethe]] || [[word:thomajeje|thomajeje]] || [[word:thomajeshe|thomajeshe]] || [[word:thomajeke|thomajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomajothotho|thomajothotho]] || [[word:thomajojojo|thomajojojo]] || [[word:thomajoshosho|thomajoshosho]] || [[word:thomajokoko|thomajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomajotho|thomajotho]] || [[word:thomajojo|thomajojo]] || [[word:thomajosho|thomajosho]] || [[word:thomajoko|thomajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomajofthof|thomajofthof]] || [[word:thomajofjof|thomajofjof]] || [[word:thomajofshof|thomajofshof]] || [[word:thomajofkof|thomajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomajïfthïf|thomajïfthïf]] || [[word:thomajïfjïf|thomajïfjïf]] || [[word:thomajïfshïf|thomajïfshïf]] || [[word:thomajïfkïf|thomajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomajïfthïfthïf|thomajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thomajïfjïfjïf|thomajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thomajïfshïfshïf|thomajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thomajïfkïfkïf|thomajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomajïfthïf|thomajïfthïf]] || [[word:thomajïfjïf|thomajïfjïf]] || [[word:thomajïfshïf|thomajïfshïf]] || [[word:thomajïfkïf|thomajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomajïfthïf|thomajïfthïf]] || [[word:thomajïfjïf|thomajïfjïf]] || [[word:thomajïfshïf|thomajïfshïf]] || [[word:thomajïfkïf|thomajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomajæthæ|thomajæthæ]] || [[word:thomajæjæ|thomajæjæ]] || [[word:thomajæshæ|thomajæshæ]] || [[word:thomajækæ|thomajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomajathatha|thomajathatha]] || [[word:thomajajaja|thomajajaja]] || [[word:thomajashasha|thomajashasha]] || [[word:thomajakaka|thomajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomajatha|thomajatha]] || [[word:thomajaja|thomajaja]] || [[word:thomajasha|thomajasha]] || [[word:thomajaka|thomajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomajafthaf|thomajafthaf]] || [[word:thomajafjaf|thomajafjaf]] || [[word:thomajafshaf|thomajafshaf]] || [[word:thomajafkaf|thomajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thomajasha|thomajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomajshësha|thomajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomajrosha|thomajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomajmusha|thomajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomajyasha|thomajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomajnkshësha|gothomajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomajnkrosha|gothomajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomajnkmusha|gothomajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomajnkyasha|gothomajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thomamajasha|thomamajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomamajshësha|thomamajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomamajrosha|thomamajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomamajmusha|thomamajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomamajyasha|thomamajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomamajnkshësha|gothomamajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomamajnkrosha|gothomamajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomamajnkmusha|gothomamajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomamajnkyasha|gothomamajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:themæjasha|themæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:themæjshësha|themæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:themæjrosha|themæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:themæjmusha|themæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:themæjyasha|themæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothemæjnkshësha|gothemæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothemæjnkrosha|gothemæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothemæjnkmusha|gothemæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothemæjnkyasha|gothemæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thomfajasha|thomfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomfajshësha|thomfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomfajrosha|thomfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomfajmusha|thomfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomfajyasha|thomfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomfajnkshësha|gothomfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomfajnkrosha|gothomfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomfajnkmusha|gothomfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomfajnkyasha|gothomfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
